timestamp.description: Time of occurrence of the event. Its format is set on the consumer's side

event.description: Describes the event that took place

actions.description: Custom actions that the user can perform from the comment's header

children.description: Accepts any ReactNode. Renders in a panel within the comment event.

eventIcon.description: Custom icon that shows before the username.

eventIconAriaLabel.description:
Specify an `aria-label` for the `eventIcon`.
If no `aria-label` is passed we assume the icon is purely decorative.

eventColor.description: Background color for the comment's header.
